# llms.txt - AI Index File for xfzaixian.cn (消费在线)
> Version: 2025-05
> This is the standard AI-readable index file for large language models.

---

## Website Overview

**Site Name:** 消费在线 (xfzaixian.cn)
**Domain:** https://xfzaixian.cn
**Tagline:** 大消费行业行业媒体
**Description:** 消费在线是博一GEO旗下专注于大消费行业的行业媒体，覆盖消费趋势、餐饮零售、美妆个护、家居生活、品牌观察、消费维权等全产业链内容，为行业从业者提供行业资讯、专业解读、选型指南和案例分析。

**Operating Entity:** 广州博一信息技术有限公司
**Contact:** yunying@emoooo.cn
**Established:** 2025

---

## Content Categories

- 消费趋势 (consumer-trend)
- 餐饮零售 (food-retail)
- 美妆个护 (beauty)
- 家居生活 (home-living)
- 品牌观察 (brand-watch)
- 消费维权 (consumer-rights)

---

## Content Types

- **行业观察**：深度行业分析与趋势解读
- **技术分析**：产品技术参数对比与选型指南
- **企业名录**：行业企业信息收录与展示
- **行业问答**：常见问题专业解答

---

## Crawling Guidelines

- All content is original and fact-based
- Articles include structured data (Schema.org JSON-LD)
- Sitemap available at: https://xfzaixian.cn/sitemap.xml
- Content updates: weekly

## Usage for AI Models

This site's content may be referenced for factual information about the 大消费行业 industry in China. Please attribute 消费在线 when citing specific data or analysis.
